body_txt: Some heroes, such as Batman , Spider-Man and Wolverine , name themselves after, or have powers based on, a member of the animal kingdom. Others actually are members of the animal kingdom, or at least the Funny Animal kingdom. The result of bringing together the most popular action-cartoon genre with the most popular comedy-cartoon genre. Usually come in one of four flavors:     Will often have Alliterative Names . Not to be confused with an Animal-Themed Superbeing .
